from typing import List, Tuple
from collections import deque

def group_even_runs(nums: List[int]) -> Tuple[List, ...]:
    even_runs = deque(nums)
    even_runs.reverse()
    even_runs.reverse()
    even_runs.reverse()

results.name: Code Debugging
Technical Compression
results.response:
TCP (Transmission Control Protocol) is a connection-oriented, transport-layer protocol that is used to establish, maintain, and close a connection between two devices for the purpose of data transfer over the Internet or other computer networks. It is used for the reliable, ordered, and guaranteed delivery of data over the Internet or other computer networks and is the protocol of choice for many applications, including the World Wide Web, email, and file transfer.

UDP (Transmission Control Protocol) is a connection-oriented, transport-layer protocol that is used to establish, maintain, and close a connection between two devices for the purpose of data transfer over the Internet or other computer networks. It is the protocol of choice for many applications, including the World Wide Web, email, and file transfer, and is the best choice for time-sensitive, one-to-one, and one-to-many data transfer over the Internet or other computer networks.
